plan_adherence_notes: All 10 plan steps were executed faithfully. All 7 decisions (d1-d7) are reflected in the implementation: AccountPnlSection tested for no-accountId state only (d1), URL params tested via MemoryRouter initialEntries (d2), mock data has 3 points per series and 3 volume buckets (d3), dropdown interaction uses getByTestId('market-select') + fireEvent.change (d4), interval toggle verified via active button styling (d5), API client module mocked at vi.mock level (d6), describe/it/beforeEach structure matches MarketList pattern (d7). Minor addition of topTraders in mock data not in plan but harmless.
research_quality_notes: All 5 questions answered with specific file/line evidence. All 5 assumptions verified (4 CORRECT, 1 UNCERTAIN but properly handled via localStorage.clear() in beforeEach). Research correctly identified data-testid attributes, dropdown implementation details, and conditional chart rendering behavior.
missed_questions: Should AnalyticsSummaryCards (totalTrades, totalVolume, uniqueTraders) be asserted on when data loads?
Should getMarketAnalytics error state be tested separately from listMarkets error?
Should TraderLeaderboard rendering be verified in the data-loaded test?
reason: All 8 tests pass. Execution closely followed the 10-step plan with all 7 design decisions properly implemented. Research was thorough with code-level evidence. Questions covered the core concerns (mock shape, interaction methods, scope decisions). Minor gaps: no tests for AnalyticsSummaryCards, TraderLeaderboard, or getMarketAnalytics-specific errors — these are nice-to-haves, not blockers. The test file provides solid coverage of loading, error, empty, data-loaded, dropdown interaction, interval toggle, URL param initialization, and AccountPnlSection prompt states.
